spine_sentence: This unit explains why a small qualitative corpus supports local analytic visibility but not representative generalisation.
scope_boundary: Clarify a methods limitation only; do not report results or make population claims.
core_claims: The corpus has three anonymised drafting sessions; it tests whether the coding framework can expose revision-control failures; it cannot estimate prevalence or prove model causality.
do_not_change: Do not call the corpus representative; do not claim broad prevalence; do not move next-chapter pattern findings into this subsection.
